description_long: This is a decorative urban kiosk set on a hexagonal tiled platform with a striking geometric pattern in black, white, and olive green. The kiosk features a raised stone or concrete base with steps leading up to an open, octagonal pavilion supported by slender black metal columns. The roof is a scalloped, teal-colored metal canopy with a central finial and ornamental trim, providing both shade and visual interest. The open design allows for visibility and access from all sides, with a small staircase at the front for entry. The structure is reminiscent of classic park bandstands or gazebos, often found in public squares or gardens. No signage or windows are visible, and the overall style blends Victorian decorative elements with modern geometric paving.
description: A decorative, open-sided urban kiosk with a teal scalloped metal roof, black columns, and a hexagonal tiled base featuring bold geometric patterns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main staircase, ornate black columns, and the teal scalloped roof atop a hexagonal patterned platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the geometric tile pattern and the open entryway with steps leading up to the kiosk.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the open structure, the full extent of the tiled base, and the decorative roof details.
description_view_3: Back view showing the open rear of the kiosk, the supporting columns, and the absence of entry steps on this side.
attribute_door_configuration: single open entryway with steps at front
attribute_roof_design: Octagonal, scalloped, teal metal roof with central finial and decorative trim, overhanging the open pavilion.
